pattern: A boolean reachability DP marks each prefix length as splittable when the last two or three elements form one of the allowed blocks.
hints: Think of it as: can I cleanly end a partition right after index i?
Position i is reachable if a valid block of length two or three ends there and the position before that block was also reachable.
Let dp[i] mean the first i elements can be partitioned; transition from dp[i-2] for an equal pair and dp[i-3] for an equal triple or a run of three consecutive increasing values.

edge_inputs.description: a pair then a consecutive run combine
looks splittable but leftover single blocks it

stress.description: large array biased toward equal runs and small steps so partitions sometimes exist
